name: Kraeuterfladen- Waehe (Swabian Pizza)
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup sour cream (1/2 cup plus 1/2 tablespoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix a regular yeast dough and shape it into small circles, 4 1/2 to 6 inches in diameter.
2. Stretch these circles from the center towards the edges so that the center is slightly thinner and the edge of the circle forms a slightly thicker rim.
3. Finely chop the onion and chives, mix with the egg and sour cream.
4. Stir in the nutmeg and salt. Fill the center of the 'Waehe' with this mixture.
5. Bake at moderate heat until golden yellow.
6. Remove from oven, dot with butter, and serve piping hot.
Serves 4.
